meta.title: CloudElite — Certified Salesforce® Consulting Partner
meta.description: CloudElite delivers deep expertise in Salesforce® consulting and implementation — enabling your team to collaborate effectively and deliver unmatched customer experiences.

hero.description: CloudElite delivers deep expertise in Salesforce® consulting and implementation — enabling your team to collaborate effectively and deliver unmatched customer experiences.
hero.card1Desc: Accelerate revenue with intelligent pipeline management and automation.
hero.card2Desc: Deliver seamless customer support across every channel.
hero.card3Desc: Data-driven insights for smarter business decisions.

services.label: What We Do
services.title: End-to-End Salesforce® Solutions
services.description: From strategy to implementation, we deliver certified expertise across the full Salesforce® ecosystem.
services.salesCloudDesc: Optimize your sales process with intelligent lead management, opportunity tracking, and revenue forecasting powered by Salesforce®.
services.serviceCloudDesc: Deliver exceptional customer service with omni-channel support, case management, and AI-powered service automation.
services.marketingCloudDesc: Create personalized customer journeys with data-driven campaigns, email automation, and real-time engagement analytics.
services.experienceCloudDesc: Build branded portals, communities, and digital experiences that deepen customer and partner engagement.
services.integrationDesc: Seamlessly integrate Salesforce® with your existing systems and migrate data with zero downtime and full integrity.
services.customDevDesc: Extend Salesforce® with custom applications, Apex development, Lightning components, and tailored workflows.

why.label: Why CloudElite
why.description: Our certified team ensures a smooth, high-fidelity delivery from the moment you engage with us through project completion.
why.feature1Desc: A single point of contact who understands your goals and ensures seamless communication throughout the project lifecycle.
why.feature2Desc: Our consultants hold multiple Salesforce® certifications, bringing industry best practices to every engagement.
why.feature3Desc: We don't just implement — we drive organizational effectiveness, ensuring your team fully adopts and thrives with Salesforce®.
why.feature4Desc: Comprehensive customer analytics strategy that transforms data into actionable insights for smarter decision-making.

contact.label: Get In Touch
contact.title: Let's Discuss Your Salesforce® Journey
contact.description: Whether you're starting fresh or optimizing an existing org, our team is ready to help you unlock the full potential of Salesforce®.
contact.projectPlaceholder: Briefly describe your goals and challenges...

footer.brand: Certified Salesforce® Consulting Partner delivering end-to-end cloud solutions that drive business transformation.
footer.trademark: Salesforce® is a registered trademark of Salesforce, Inc.

blog.label: Our Blog
blog.title: Insights & Resources
blog.description: Expert perspectives on Salesforce, CRM strategy, and digital transformation to help your business grow.
blog.ctaTitle: Ready to transform your Salesforce experience?
blog.ctaDesc: Our certified consultants are here to help you get the most out of your CRM investment.
blog.metaDesc: Insights, guides, and best practices for Salesforce implementation and CRM strategy from the CloudElite team.

thankyou.title: Thank You!
thankyou.description: We've received your request and one of our Salesforce® consultants will be in touch with you shortly.
